tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Application Writing.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Application Writing का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Sir, I request three days of leave from you. I want leave because I am unwell. Please approve my leave. I would like to apply for this position. I have sufficient experience for this job.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Application Writing.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Application Writing का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Please accept my application. I am applying for a transfer. I need to change my city because of my family. I am applying for a scholarship. My marks are sufficient for this scholarship.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "मुझे एक बोनाफाइड प्रमाण पत्र चाहिए।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "I will like to apply for this position."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I would like to apply for this position.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Application Writing.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Application Writing का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Thank you, I will wait for your prompt response. Yours sincerely. I am a student of this school. My roll number is twenty-five.
